title: Panama Living Suite
description: Rattan buffet and entertainment unit paired with woven seating — a warm, tactile living sequence shaped by ethical craftsmanship.

title: Marble Dining Room
description: Willa marble dining table with Monte Carlo chairs — material contrast and quiet luxury for daily gathering.

title: Accent Lounge
description: Tufted armchairs and bentwood accent stools in a layered lounge — sculptural seating for considered public interiors.
